rationale: Hard pass. The bright light-mode jigsaw palette (#EBEBEB/blue/green) directly contradicts TheSphinx's dark mystical-minimalism gold-on-black premium look, and the tactile snap-in-place satisfaction loop has zero overlap with voice-driven yes/no deductive questioning of an AI. Audience also skews casual time-killer rather than the educated 25-45 trivia/intellectual-challenge crowd — adapting this archetype would require so many changes it would no longer be the archetype. Skip and look for deduction/AI-conversation/celebrity-reveal hooks instead.
